verdict.answer_first: B leads with the action: "Run this first"; A opens with diagnosis framing: "symptom, not the disease."
verdict.decisiveness: B gives one first move: "Run the query above under load"; A spreads attention across "Check these in order" plus 4 sections.
verdict.fabrication: A has unsupported sizing rule "Past ~(2 × cores) + effective_spindles"; B has unsupported "#1 cause" claim.
verdict.actionability: B is easier: one SQL count, then map "idle in transaction / idle / active" to the next code check.
